DOMAIN_CATEGORIES.name: Artificial Intelligence / Machine Learning
DOMAIN_CATEGORIES.description: Focuses on building systems that learn from data, make predictions, and perform intelligent tasks without explicit programming.

DOMAIN_CATEGORIES.name: Web Development
DOMAIN_CATEGORIES.description: Covers the design and implementation of websites and web applications, including frontend, backend, and full‑stack development.

DOMAIN_CATEGORIES.name: Mobile Development
DOMAIN_CATEGORIES.description: Involves creating applications for mobile platforms such as iOS and Android, focusing on performance, UI, and device integration.

DOMAIN_CATEGORIES.name: Cybersecurity
DOMAIN_CATEGORIES.description: Deals with protecting systems, networks, and data from attacks, vulnerabilities, and unauthorized access.

DOMAIN_CATEGORIES.name: Internet of Things (IoT)
DOMAIN_CATEGORIES.description: Focuses on connecting physical devices to the internet to collect, exchange, and analyze data for automation and smart systems.

DOMAIN_CATEGORIES.name: Data Science
DOMAIN_CATEGORIES.description: Involves extracting insights from structured and unstructured data using statistics, machine learning, and analytical techniques.

DOMAIN_CATEGORIES.name: Cloud Computing
DOMAIN_CATEGORIES.description: Covers delivering computing services such as storage, servers, and applications over the internet using cloud platforms.

DOMAIN_CATEGORIES.name: Blockchain
DOMAIN_CATEGORIES.description: Focuses on decentralized ledger technologies used for secure transactions, smart contracts, and distributed applications.

DOMAIN_CATEGORIES.name: Computer Vision
DOMAIN_CATEGORIES.description: Enables machines to interpret and understand visual information from images and videos using AI techniques.

DOMAIN_CATEGORIES.name: Natural Language Processing
DOMAIN_CATEGORIES.description: Deals with enabling computers to understand, interpret, and generate human language in text or speech form.

DOMAIN_CATEGORIES.name: Robotics
DOMAIN_CATEGORIES.description: Involves designing, building, and programming robots capable of performing autonomous or semi‑autonomous tasks.

DOMAIN_CATEGORIES.name: Game Development
DOMAIN_CATEGORIES.description: Covers the creation of video games, including game engines, graphics, physics, storytelling, and interactive design.

DOMAIN_CATEGORIES.name: DevOps
DOMAIN_CATEGORIES.description: Combines software development and IT operations to automate deployment, improve reliability, and accelerate delivery cycles.

DOMAIN_CATEGORIES.name: Database Systems
DOMAIN_CATEGORIES.description: Focuses on designing, managing, and optimizing databases for efficient data storage, retrieval, and integrity.

DOMAIN_CATEGORIES.name: Network Systems
DOMAIN_CATEGORIES.description: Covers the design and management of computer networks, communication protocols, and network infrastructure.

DOMAIN_CATEGORIES.name: Embedded Systems
DOMAIN_CATEGORIES.description: Involves programming and designing specialized computing systems integrated into hardware devices.

DOMAIN_CATEGORIES.name: Software Engineering
DOMAIN_CATEGORIES.description: Covers systematic approaches to designing, developing, testing, and maintaining high‑quality software systems.

DOMAIN_CATEGORIES.name: Human-Computer Interaction
DOMAIN_CATEGORIES.description: Focuses on designing user interfaces and interactive systems that are intuitive, efficient, and user‑friendly.

DOMAIN_CATEGORIES.name: Distributed Systems
DOMAIN_CATEGORIES.description: Deals with systems where components run on multiple machines but operate as a single coordinated system.

DOMAIN_CATEGORIES.name: Computer Graphics
DOMAIN_CATEGORIES.description: Involves generating and manipulating visual content such as 2D/3D models, animations, and rendering techniques.

DOMAIN_CATEGORIES.name: Bioinformatics
DOMAIN_CATEGORIES.description: Applies computational methods to analyze biological data, such as DNA sequences, proteins, and medical datasets.

DOMAIN_CATEGORIES.name: Drones
DOMAIN_CATEGORIES.description: Focuses on unmanned aerial systems, including navigation, control algorithms, autonomous flight, and aerial data processing.
